titleStmt.title: SII 22.387: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 387. (A.R. No. 387 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. ROCK-CUT ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL. MĀR. TRIBH. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA (II*)—7th YEAR (A.D. 1245).

summary.p: The details of date are given as [Ṛisha]bha, 13, śu. 10, Sunday, Uttiram which would correspond to A.D. 1245, May 7.

The inscription gives details of the settlement of a long standing dispute between the trustees of the two adjoining Śiva and Vishṇu temples of Tirumeyyattu Mahādēva and Tirumeyyattu-Niṉṟaruḷiya-Perumāṉ, which had resulted in the negleet of their lands and the stoppage of worship in both. A meeting was held in the presence of Appaṇṇa-Daṇḍanāyaka, the brother-in-law of Ravidēva Daṇḍanāyaka (who is said to have taken possession of the nāḍu on behalf of his lord Hoysaḷa Vīra-Sōmēśvara), of all the representative inhabitants of the nāuḍ nagaram and the Villages of Kāna-nāḍu alias Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, and several other important persons of whom a long list is given They sent for the two parties concerned and asked for the accounts as they stood on that day. They then arrived at an arrangement satisfactory to both. The paddy yield of some lands common to them was to be shared in the ratio of two to three. Lands at Ūṟṟiyūr and Maṅgalam except those specifically assigned to one or the other were divided equally. Some dēvadāna lands belonging exclusively to the Vishṇu temple were exchanged for those of another Śiva temple of the place called Vānavaṉmādīśvaram-Uḍaiyār. Certain lands were to go to the priests of the Vishṇu temple and certain others assigned to the Śiva temple. Lands at Aṇḍakkuḍi and Perundurai were to continue in the name of Niṉṟaruḷiya-Perumān as before. The spring to the east was to belong to this god and the stone well near the bali-piṭha to Mahādēva. A dividing wall if erected between the two temples, was to be built according to a specified plan, leaving the western portion of the two temples open. Each temple was to bear its own cost of maintaining the uvachchar playing music in the temples according to its needs. Old stone inscriptions relating to each temple except those which had been cancelled, were to be re-engraved in the respective temples having been copied over from the other.

This arbitration of the dispute by Appaṇṇa-Daṇḍanāyaka and the mention of the conquest of Kāna-nādu by Vīra-Sōmēśvara from an unknown adversary in the reign and country of the Pāṇḍya king, deserve to be noted, as perhaps showing the dependence of the latter upon the former and the friendly relations of the two at the time.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 7vatu vṛṣabha nāyiṟṟup patiṉmuṉṟāntiyatiyum pūrvapakṣattu daśamiyum nāyiṟṟukkiḻa
maiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ kānaṉāṭāṉa virutarāja payaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu nāṭukaḷomum nakaraṅkaḷomum grāmaṅkaḷomum camayattārum Ināṭṭu kāppaārāṉa Araicukaḷomum Iṉṉāṭṭu śrīrudra śrīmāheśvararum pāṇ
ṭināṭṭu nallataṟiyum perumāṉ Irāvaḷa mutaliyārum Ināṭṭu tavaṇai koyil[ār śrī] picca mutaliyārum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷum tirumeyattu śrīmāheśvararum śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷum tirumalaināṭṭu tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāya
ṉār koyil śrīrudraśrīmāheśvararum Ināṭṭukku śrīvaiṣṇavar Aṉusandhānam keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu tirukkoṭṭayūr patiṉ Eṭṭu maṇṭalattukku camainta bhāradvāji nārāyaṇaṉ śrīkumārapaṭṭaṉāṉa Uṭaiyār tiruppāṇi tāta
rum Ivvaṉaivom Ināṭu Uṭaiya svasiśrī śrīmaṟpradāpacakravatti pocala śrī virasomiśvaradevar daṇḍanāyakkarkaḷil Ināṭu piṭitta Iravidevar daṇḍanāyakkar maithunaṉ Appaṇṇa daṇḍanāyakkar muṉnilaiyāka tirumeyat
tile kūṭi Iruntu kāriyam Aṟutiyiṭṭapaṭi Ivvūr kaṭamaikku śrīmāheśvararum śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷum taṅkaḷil koḷkappaṭikku yiṇaṅka neṭuṅkāla taṭaikiṭantu kiḻuruṇṭu Uḷḷa nāḷil Iṭaiyil payiṟeṟiṉa Āṇṭukaḷil Uṭal
nāṭṭu viṉiyokammāka Aḻintupoy pūjaiyum tiruvārātanaiyum muṭamāy kiṭantamaiyil Ivviraṇṭu tiṟavaraiyum Aḻaittu kaṇakku Iruntapaṭi keṭṭu Ivviraṇṭu tiṟavaraiyum porunta Aṟuti Iṭṭapaṭi tirumeyattu Ūrum
piṭākaikaḷum vaḷaiyil cuṟṟumuṟṟa Uḷḷa nilam payir pāṟttu kaṭamai kaṭṭi mutallāle nellu Aiñciṭṭu Irukūṟu tirumeyattu māhādevar peṟuvārākavum mukkūṟu tirumeyyattemperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevar peṟuvā
rākavum vānavaṉmāteviśvaram Uṭaiya nāyanār tevatānam rājarājavayak kallukku vaṭakkiṟ kaṭavaittuṭavalil tirunandavanam kiṇaṟuṭpaṭa teṟkaṭaiya nikki nikki niṉṟa nirnilamum Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam Irājarā
javayakkal nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilamum kūkamāṉ tuṭavallum Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevaṟku viṭṭu Itukku talaimāṟāka śrīvāṉavaṉ mādeviśvaramuṭaiya nāyanāṟku viṭṭu Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevar te
vatānam māṅkuḻiyum tirunārāyaṇa vayakkalum Araṅkaṉ kuḻiyum Itiṟ kiṇaṟum piṭāri koyilukku melai māṅkuḻi Oṉṟum peṟuvatākavum Iraṇṭu koyilukkum naṭuvu tirumatiḷ potum miṭattu paḷḷikoṇ
ṭaruḷiṉa Āḻvār mukamaṇṭapattu melai cuvarukku meṟkku nāṭāka niccayittu Ellai Aṟuti paṇṇi nāṭṭiṉa kalle tiruttu taruvatākavum vaṭa talai tirumatiṭcuvar paḷḷikoṇṭaruḷiya Āḻvār mukamaṇṭapattu melai ja
katipaṭaikku mekku Iraṇṭaṭi viṭṭu Itaṉ meṟke taccaṉ muṭik kolālē Oru muḻa Akalam cuvaṟkaṉamākat tirumatiḷ Iṭavum Ippaṭi Iṭumiṭattu teṟkkil kaiyyuruvic cuvarai muṭṭac ceyyāte matiḷ potuvatāka
vum Ittirumatiḷ pomiṭattuk kaṭamai koḷḷum viḻukkāṭṭile Iraṇṭu tiṟavarum potā nerntu ceyvippārkaḷākavum kaiyuruvi cuvar kiḻakkup potummiṭattu vaṭakku nokkip pokiṟa sabhaippotu Oḻukayile
uḻutaṟuppākakaṭavatākavum meṟkku tiruvācal Iṉṟi veḷiyāka kiṭappatākavum Iraṇṭu koyilukkum naṭuvu nokkiya tirumatiḷ maraṅkaḷ Ippaṭi pokaṭuvatākavum kaiyuruvit teṉ cuva(r)rilum va
ṭa cuva(r)rilum mel cuvarilum kiḻcuvarilum Ellaikaḷuḷḷa Aṟutikaḷile Iraṇṭu tiṟavarum tiruccūlakkallum tiruvāḻikkallum veṭṭi nāṭṭikkoḷvār kaḷākavum kiḻai tiruccuṉai Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya
tevarute Āvutākavum Iccuṉai tuṟavai vāṅkum miṭattu Iraṇṭu tiṟavar kaṇkāṇiyumiṭṭu vāṅkuvatākavum Itturavaiyil māhādevar koyilil tevarkaḷ Uṇṭākil Ikkoyil tāṉattār taṅkaḷ koyil Aṟa
Eḻuntaruḷivittukkoṇṭu povārkaḷḷākavum Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevar koyil tevarkaḷuṇṭākil śrīvaiṣṇavar taṅkaḷ koyilil Eḻuntaruḷi vittukkoṇṭu povārkaḷākavum Ittevarkaḷai Oḻiya po
mmāy kiṭanta tuṇṭākil kaṭamaiviḻukkāṭṭile Iraṇṭu tiṟavarum pokaṭavarkaḷākavum mahādevar koyiṟtiruvācalil balipiṭhattiṉ meṟkil kaṟkiṇaṟu mātevarutākavum Itu turavai vāṅku
mpotu Iraṇṭu tiṟavar kaṇkāṇiyoṭu vāṅkuvatākavum Itil mahādevar koyiṟtevarkaḷuṇṭākil tāṉattār taṅkaḷ koyiliṟ Eḻuntaruḷuvittu koṇṭu povārkaḷākavum Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiyatevar
koyiṟ tevarkaḷuṇṭākil śrīvaiṣṇavar taṅkaḷ koyiliṟ Eḻuntaruḷi vittu koṇṭu povārkaḷākavum Ittevarkaḷai Oruppotu miḷaiyumuṇṭā kiṭantaṉa Uṇṭākil kaṭamai viḻukkāṭṭile Iraṇṭu tiṟavaru
ṅ koḷvārkaḷākavum Iraṇṭu koyilukkum naṭuvuponta tirumatuḷukku meṟku meṟkellai maṇmatiṭ vaṭakkum mele muṭṭa Iṭṭa maṇcuvaru ṭikkiḻakku mahādevarutākavum Iraṇṭu koyi
lukku naṭuvuponta tirumatiḷukku kiḻakkum kiḻellai vaṭakku nokki pokiṟa Oḻikkaikku meṟkum vaṭavellai malaikkuṅ kaṟpāṟaikkun teṟkum Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevarute Ākavum teṟkiṟ kiḻmelāka
ponta tiruviti maṭcuvarukku vaṭakkum kaiyyuruvic cuvarukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai vaṭakku nokki pokiṟa Oḻukkaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai veṅkaik kuḷakkaraikku vaṭakkum
melpāṟkellai kaṇakkarakaṅkaḷukku kiḻakkut teṟkunokki pokiṟa Oḻukkaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai tiruvitit teṉcuvarukkut teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellai Uḷḷakappaṭṭa
nilattil Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevar tiruvaṭi piṭikkum nampi mārkaḷ maṉaikkum Immaṉaikaḷukkup piḻakkaṭai cāḷaratte Immaṉaikaḷiṟ teṉcuvar tuṭaṅkit teṟku ṉokki Irupattu nālaṭi taṟaiviṭṭu
nikki niṉṟa nilattil tarucaṭṭu Ikkūṟu teṉvaṭal muṭṭa meṟkaṇaiya mahādevarutākavum mukkūṟu teṉvaṭal muṭṭa kiḻakkum Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevarutākavum tirumeyyat temperumāṉ niṉṟa
ruḷiya tevar tevatāṉam Aṇṭakkuṭi nāṉkellaiyum perun tuṟaiyum paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭaiye Emperumā ṉinṟaruḷiya tevarute Āvatākavum Ikkoyilkaḷil Ukaccaṟku Aṇṭakkuṭi nilakkaṉātavi
terviḻukkāṭṭukku taṉittaṉiyey taṅkaḷukku veṇṭum Ukac cīṭṭu cipaṇṭāraṅkaḷile taṉittaṉiye ciṉṉamiṭṭu koṭṭivittuk koḷvār kaḷākavum maṟṟum taṉittaṉi Uṭaiyāṉai maṟṟum O
paṇṭāṭu paḻanaṭaiye Aṉupavippārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi Aṟuti yiṭṭu Iṟṟai nāḷil tirumeyyattu madevaṟkum tirumeyyattemperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevaṟkum I nāṭṭu Ūṟṟiyūril Antaṇar vilaikoṇṭu
ṭātu nāṭṭuppotuvāka Ōlai pokaṭṭuppoṉa melaippāti nilattil maṅkalattu Eḻunāṭṭu vaṇakaremperumāṉukku nāṭāka Iṟaiyili kārāṇmaiyāka viṭṭa piṭāraṉ vayakkalum melaikkiṇa
ṟum nikki nikki niṉṟa nilattil paḻantevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam nikki nikki niṉṟa nilamum kiṇaṟukaḷum kiṇaṟu cūḻnta maraṅkaḷum Akamaṉaiyum puṉceyum puḷiyum kuḷamum kuḷavāyttalaiyum Immelaip pāti
yum Ivaiyiṟṟil nilattil naṭaippaṭiye mahādevaṟkuc cempātiyum Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya tevaṟkuc cempātiyu mākkik kūṟiṭṭuk koḷvārkaḷākavum Innilaṅkaḷk kārāṇ
maiyāka nāṭṭārum viṟṟukkuṭuttu kuṭuttapaṭiye Aṉupavippārkaḷākavum Iṉṉilattāl vanta kaṭamai Accunāṭṭu viniyokam veṭṭi muṭṭāvāḷ cantivigrahappeṟum
maiyāka nāṭṭār Iṟaiyili kārāṇmaiyāka Iraṇṭu tiṟavarum moyaṉupavippārkaḷākavum paḻaṅ kalveṭṭukaḷil Aḻippatāṉa kalveṭṭu mahādevar koyilil tiruvācalil kiḻcuvaril
Inta kalveṭṭum kaṇmalarntaruḷiṉa Emperumāṉ mukamaṇṭapattu [ rāma] su[ ndara] muventaveḷāṉ nimantañ cetta kalveṭṭum Āka Ivai
Aḻittup pokaṭuvatākavum mahādevaṟku svatantramāy Emperumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiya devar koyilil Uḷḷa kalveṭṭukkaḷ paṭiyeṭuttu tāṉattār taṅkaḷ koyilile kalveṭṭikkoḷvārkaḷākavum Empe
rumāṉ niṉṟaruḷiyatevaṟku svatantramāy mahādevar koyilil Uḷḷa kal veṭṭukkaḷ śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ paṭieṭuttukkoṇṭu taṅkaḷ koyilile kalveṭṭik koḷvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭikaḷukku Aḻivu coṉṉāruṇṭākil rājadrohikaḷumāy mā
tādrohikaḷumāy drohikaḷumāy janmahāniyum prāṇa hāṉiyum paṭṭu Aṉṟāṭukoviṉukku Irunūṟu Accut teṇṭamum vaccapiṉpum Ikkal veṭṭiṉpaṭiye candrādityavaṟ celvatāka Ippaṭi Amaittom nāṭukaḷomum nakaraṅ kaḷomum grāmaṅka
ḷomum camaiya(ma)ttārkaḷum Ināṭṭu kāppārāṉa Araiyakaḷomum śrīrudraśrīmāheśvararum pāṇṭināṭṭu nallataṟiyum perumāḷi rāvaḷamutaliyārum tavaṇaikku kaṭava koyil piccamutaliyārum Innāṭṭu śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷum tirumeyattu śrīmā
heśvararum śrīvaiṣṇavarum tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār śrīrudra śrīmāheśvararum Iṉṉāṭṭukku śrīvaiṣṇavar Anusan=tāṉam tirukkoṭṭaiyūr patiṉeṭṭu maṇṭalattukkum Amainta bhāradvāji nārāyaṇaṉ śrīkumārapaṭṭaṉum
Uṭaiyār tirupāṇitātarum Innāṭuṭaiya svastiśrīmaṟ pradāpaccakravatti bhocaḷa śrīvirasomiśvaradevar daṇḍanāyakkarkaḷil Iravideva daṇḍanāyakkar maithuṉaṉ Appaṇṇa daṇḍanāyakkarum Ivvaṉaivomum svastiśrī Itu śrī māheśvara rakṣai .
coḻakāṉa nāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kulottuṅkacoḻa vallanāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koṭṭaiyūr tānattom kāṉanāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pperumāḷeḻuttu
ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vikkiramacoḻakkāṉaṉāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai maruṅkūṟ cuntarapāṇṭiyak kāṉanāṭṭu veḷā ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ceṅkatirccolaik kāṉanāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu
kāṉanāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aḻakiya pāṇṭiyak kāṉanāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai peruntuṟai veḷāṉeḻuttu colai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai teṟkāṭṭur Uttamapāṇṭiyak kāṉanāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu
There are four more lines mentioning names of signatories, but they are hopelessly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 22.387 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
